mapper.sql: courseware_id, teaching_id, folder_name, title, file_url, file_name, file_size, sort_order, upload_time, del_flag
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into biz_courseware(teaching_id, folder_name, title, file_url, file_name, file_size, sort_order, upload_time, del_flag) values (#{teachingId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{folderName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileSize,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{uploadTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()

teaching_id,
folder_name,
title,
file_url,

file_size,

mapper.update:
update biz_courseware
teaching_id = #{teachingId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
folder_name = #{folderName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
file_url = #{fileUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
file_name = #{fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
file_size = #{fileSize,jdbcType=BIGINT},
sort_order = #{sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER},
upload_time = #{uploadTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR},
where courseware_id = #{coursewareId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update biz_courseware set teaching_id = #{teachingId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, folder_name = #{folderName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_url = #{fileUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_name = #{fileName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_size = #{fileSize,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sort_order = #{sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER}, upload_time = #{uploadTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=CHAR} where courseware_id = #{coursewareId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
